fieldDescription: Uses Particle Engine for supported Blackrock cosmetic particle bursts when Particle Engine is installed.
Scales supported Blackrock cosmetic particle counts. Damage and gameplay behavior are unchanged.
Enables supported Blackrock combat light effects.
Allows Ship Mastery System to offer Blackrock-specific hullmod package masteries for eligible Blackrock ships.
Allows Blackrock to add its static core worlds in Nexerelin Corvus mode. Disable to let Nexerelin start its own sector generation.
